title: Open Weights and American AI Leadership
excerpt: Open weight AI can expand access, strengthen competition, improve security, and help sustain American AI leadership.
content_html:
July 24, 2026

In the 1980s, early open-source software pioneers challenged the prevailing belief that software would advance only if companies kept tight control over their code. This movement pushed for a transparent ecosystem where developers around the world could study, modify, and improve software. Software developed by the open-source community now supports most of the internet and underlies systems used by the world’s largest technology companies, as well as the U.S. military and federal agencies conducting scientific research, cybersecurity, and other critical missions. Open source did more than lower the cost of software; it created a shared foundation of knowledge on which generations of American engineers and entrepreneurs built their institutional sovereignty.

The United States now faces a similar choice with artificial intelligence. Our AI leadership will be judged not by one frontier AI model, but by whether the United States builds a strong, open ecosystem that diffuses into every sector. This is essential for creating opportunities for innovation and prosperity across the country. It requires expanding access to AI, encouraging competition, robust application layers, and giving Americans greater control over the technology they rely on. Open weight models—AI models that anyone can download, inspect, modify, and run on their own infrastructure are an important part of that foundation because they make advanced AI more accessible, adaptable, and widely available.

Open weights expand access to the AI economy. Startups, established businesses, universities, and public institutions can build on advanced models without training one from scratch or paying frontier-model prices for every task. Open weights let every organization match the right model to the right job at the right cost, reserving frontier-scale capability for genuine frontier problems and running efficient, specialized models everywhere else. That discipline is what will make AI economically sustainable as its use scales into the billions of everyday tasks. America wins the AI era by diffusing it into the workflows of factories, hospitals, farms, classrooms, and main street businesses.

Open weights expand access to the AI economy. Startups, established businesses, universities, and public institutions can build on advanced models without training one from scratch or paying frontier-model prices for every task. Open weights let every organization match the right model to the right job at the right cost, reserving frontier-scale capability for genuine frontier problems and running efficient, specialized models everywhere else. That discipline is what will make AI economically sustainable as its use scales into the billions of everyday tasks. America wins the AI era by diffusing it into the workflows of factories, hospitals, farms, classrooms, and main street businesses.

Open weights also strengthen competition and competition is what keeps the gains of AI broadly shared rather than concentrated in a few hands. By allowing many organizations to build, adapt, and deploy advanced models, open weights create rivalry not only among model developers but across cloud chips, applications, and services. That competition spurs innovation, drives down costs, and distributes the benefits of AI broadly across our economy.

Open weights also give customers greater control. As organizations invest in AI, they want to know that they will not become locked into a single provider or lose the knowledge and capabilities they build over time. Open weight models help provide that assurance by allowing organizations to control their own data, evaluate and adapt models to their own needs, and deploy them wherever their business requirements demand. And as organizations create value with AI, open weights allow them to own that value through self-improving models, specialized capabilities, and accumulated knowledge that drive American sovereignty and prosperity.

To be sure, open weights carry real and distinct risks. Once released, the weights are beyond the original developer’s control, and modified versions are difficult to trace or reverse. But the right response to this risk is not to prohibit open weights. In a world where cybersecurity attackers use advanced AI, defenders need access to models with comparable capabilities so they can detect, simulate, and respond to emerging threats. Open models broaden defensive capability, increase transparency, and allow vulnerabilities to be discovered and remediated across many teams.

In fact, openness may be one of the most important paths to AI safety and security. Relying solely on closed models is not inherently safe: they can be breached, misused, or fail in ways that outsiders cannot detect. And concentrating advanced AI capabilities behind a small number of closed models compounds that risk. It results in a small number of single points of failure, weakens competition, and leaves critical technology in the hands of a few providers. Open weight models, on the other hand, allow a broad community of researchers and developers to examine their behavior, identify vulnerabilities, develop safeguards, and improve them over time. Just as open-source software demonstrated that transparency can be more secure than obscurity, AI safety may depend on giving more people the ability to test and strengthen the models on which society relies. It allows for rigorous benchmarking and evaluation, red teaming, and protections tied to real and demonstrated harms rather than assuming that closed systems are safer by default.

A strong AI ecosystem is not a foregone conclusion. Policymakers have an important opportunity to act. This includes expanding access to compute for startups and researchers, investing in shared training assets (datasets, tools, evaluation frameworks), and keeping the frontier plural by avoiding premature restrictions on open models that stifle competition or drive innovation overseas. These measures must also look at how strong application layers can expand sovereign use of AI across the economy.

In shaping this ecosystem, policymakers should be careful not to conflate legitimate model-development techniques with misappropriation. Distillation, or the practice of using one model’s outputs to help train or improve another, is a widely used technique for model improvement, evaluation, and validation. It reflects a long tradition of learning from, building upon, and improving existing technologies, a tradition that has helped drive innovation since the rise of the open-source software movement. By contrast, unlawful efforts to extract value from closed models raise legitimate concerns. Those concerns should be addressed through targeted legal and commercial frameworks rather than sweeping restrictions on techniques that play an important role in AI innovation. 

The age of AI can be one of prosperity. With the right choices, open weight AI can expand opportunity, strengthen competition, extend American technological leadership, mitigate risk, and ensure that the benefits of this extraordinary technology are shared broadly across our economy. That future is worth building, and the United States should lead in building it.

This movement pushed for a transparent ecosystem where developers around the world could study, modify, and improve software. sentences.en: In the 1980s, early open-source software pioneers challenged the prevailing belief that software would advance only if companies kept tight control over their code.
sentences.zh: 在 20 世纪 80 年代，早期的开源软件先驱对人们普遍认为只有公司严格控制其代码软件才能进步的观念提出了挑战。

sentences.en: This movement pushed for a transparent ecosystem where developers around the world could study, modify, and improve software.
sentences.zh: 这一运动推动了一个透明的生态系统，世界各地的开发人员可以在其中研究、修改和改进软件。

sentences.en: Software developed by the open-source community now supports most of the internet and underlies systems used by the world’s largest technology companies, as well as the U.S. military and federal agencies conducting scientific research, cybersecurity, and other critical missions.
sentences.zh: 开源社区开发的软件现在支持大部分互联网，并成为世界上最大的科技公司以及进行科学研究、网络安全和其他关键任务的美国军方和联邦机构使用的系统的基础。

sentences.en: Open source did more than lower the cost of software; it created a shared foundation of knowledge on which generations of American engineers and entrepreneurs built their institutional sovereignty.
sentences.zh: 开源不仅仅降低了软件成本；它创造了一个共享的知识基础，几代美国工程师和企业家在此基础上建立了他们的制度主权。

blocks.html_en: The United States now faces a similar choice with artificial intelligence. Our AI leadership will be judged not by one frontier AI model, but by whether the United States builds a strong, open ecosystem that diffuses into every sector. sentences.en: The United States now faces a similar choice with artificial intelligence.
sentences.zh: 美国现在在人工智能方面面临着类似的选择。

sentences.en: Our AI leadership will be judged not by one frontier AI model, but by whether the United States builds a strong, open ecosystem that diffuses into every sector.
sentences.zh: 我们的人工智能领导力将不是根据一种前沿人工智能模型来判断，而是根据美国是否建立了一个强大、开放的生态系统并扩散到各个领域。

sentences.en: This is essential for creating opportunities for innovation and prosperity across the country.
sentences.zh: 这对于在全国范围内创造创新和繁荣的机会至关重要。

sentences.en: It requires expanding access to AI, encouraging competition, robust application layers, and giving Americans greater control over the technology they rely on.
sentences.zh: 它需要扩大人工智能的使用范围，鼓励竞争，强大的应用层，并让美国人更好地控制他们所依赖的技术。

sentences.en: Open weight models—AI models that anyone can download, inspect, modify, and run on their own infrastructure are an important part of that foundation because they make advanced AI more accessible, adaptable, and widely available.
sentences.zh: 开放权重模型——任何人都可以在自己的基础设施上下载、检查、修改和运行的人工智能模型，是该基础的重要组成部分，因为它们使高级人工智能更易于访问、适应性更强且更广泛可用。

blocks.html_en: Open weights expand access to the AI economy. Startups, established businesses, universities, and public institutions can build on advanced models without training one from scratch or paying frontier-model prices for every task. Open weights let every organization match the right model to the right job at the right cost, reserving frontier-scale capability for genuine frontier problems and running efficient, specialized models everywhere else. That discipline is what will make AI economically sustainable as its use scales into the billions of everyday tasks. America wins the AI era by diffusing it into the workflows of factories, hospitals, farms, classrooms, and main street businesses.

sentences.en: Open weights expand access to the AI economy.
sentences.zh: 开放权重扩大了进入人工智能经济的机会。

sentences.en: Startups, established businesses, universities, and public institutions can build on advanced models without training one from scratch or paying frontier-model prices for every task.
sentences.zh: 初创企业、老牌企业、大学和公共机构可以建立先进的模型，而无需从头开始培训或为每项任务支付前沿模型的价格。

sentences.en: Open weights let every organization match the right model to the right job at the right cost, reserving frontier-scale capability for genuine frontier problems and running efficient, specialized models everywhere else.
sentences.zh: 开放权重让每个组织能够以正确的成本将正确的模型与正确的工作相匹配，为真正的前沿问题保留前沿规模的能力，并在其他地方运行高效、专业的模型。

sentences.en: That discipline is what will make AI economically sustainable as its use scales into the billions of everyday tasks.
sentences.zh: 随着人工智能的使用扩展到数十亿日常任务中，这一规则将使人工智能在经济上可持续。

sentences.en: America wins the AI era by diffusing it into the workflows of factories, hospitals, farms, classrooms, and main street businesses.
sentences.zh: 美国通过将人工智能扩散到工厂、医院、农场、教室和主要街道企业的工作流程中，赢得了人工智能时代的胜利。

sentences.en: By allowing many organizations to build, adapt, and deploy advanced models, open weights create rivalry not only among model developers but across cloud chips, applications, and services.
sentences.zh: 通过允许许多组织构建、调整和部署高级模型，开放权重不仅在模型开发人员之间，而且在云芯片、应用程序和服务之间造成竞争。

sentences.en: That competition spurs innovation, drives down costs, and distributes the benefits of AI broadly across our economy.
sentences.zh: 这种竞争刺激了创新，降低了成本，并将人工智能的好处广泛分配到我们的经济中。

sentences.en: Open weights also give customers greater control.
sentences.zh: 开放式重量还为客户提供了更大的控制权。

sentences.en: As organizations invest in AI, they want to know that they will not become locked into a single provider or lose the knowledge and capabilities they build over time.

sentences.en: Open weight models help provide that assurance by allowing organizations to control their own data, evaluate and adapt models to their own needs, and deploy them wherever their business requirements demand.

sentences.en: And as organizations create value with AI, open weights allow them to own that value through self-improving models, specialized capabilities, and accumulated knowledge that drive American sovereignty and prosperity.

sentences.en: A strong AI ecosystem is not a foregone conclusion.
sentences.zh: 强大的人工智能生态系统并非定局。

sentences.en: Policymakers have an important opportunity to act.
sentences.zh: 政策制定者有一个采取行动的重要机会。

sentences.en: This includes expanding access to compute for startups and researchers, investing in shared training assets (datasets, tools, evaluation frameworks), and keeping the frontier plural by avoiding premature restrictions on open models that stifle competition or drive innovation overseas.
sentences.zh: 这包括扩大初创公司和研究人员的计算能力，投资共享培训资产（数据集、工具、评估框架），并通过避免过早限制开放模型来抑制竞争或推动海外创新，从而保持前沿多元化。

sentences.en: These measures must also look at how strong application layers can expand sovereign use of AI across the economy.
sentences.zh: 这些措施还必须考虑强大的应用层如何扩大人工智能在整个经济领域的主权使用。

blocks.html_en: In shaping this ecosystem, policymakers should be careful not to conflate legitimate model-development techniques with misappropriation. Distillation, or the practice of using one model’s outputs to help train or improve another, is a widely used technique for model improvement, evaluation, and validation. It reflects a long tradition of learning from, building upon, and improving existing technologies, a tradition that has helped drive innovation since the rise of the open-source software movement. By contrast, unlawful efforts to extract value from closed models raise legitimate concerns. Those concerns should be addressed through targeted legal and commercial frameworks rather than sweeping restrictions on techniques that play an important role in AI innovation.

sentences.en: In shaping this ecosystem, policymakers should be careful not to conflate legitimate model-development techniques with misappropriation.
sentences.zh: 在塑造这个生态系统时，政策制定者应小心，不要将合法的模型开发技术与盗用混为一谈。

sentences.en: Distillation, or the practice of using one model’s outputs to help train or improve another, is a widely used technique for model improvement, evaluation, and validation.
sentences.zh: 蒸馏，即使用一个模型的输出来帮助训练或改进另一个模型的做法，是一种广泛使用的模型改进、评估和验证技术。

sentences.en: It reflects a long tradition of learning from, building upon, and improving existing technologies, a tradition that has helped drive innovation since the rise of the open-source software movement.
sentences.zh: 它反映了学习、构建和改进现有技术的悠久传统，这一传统自开源软件运动兴起以来一直帮助推动创新。

sentences.en: By contrast, unlawful efforts to extract value from closed models raise legitimate concerns.
sentences.zh: 相比之下，从封闭模型中获取价值的非法行为引起了合理的担忧。

sentences.en: Those concerns should be addressed through targeted legal and commercial frameworks rather than sweeping restrictions on techniques that play an important role in AI innovation.
sentences.zh: 这些担忧应该通过有针对性的法律和商业框架来解决，而不是对在人工智能创新中发挥重要作用的技术进行全面限制。

blocks.html_en: The age of AI can be one of prosperity. With the right choices, open weight AI can expand opportunity, strengthen competition, extend American technological leadership, mitigate risk, and ensure that the benefits of this extraordinary technology are shared broadly across our economy. That future is worth building, and the United States should lead in building it.

sentences.en: The age of AI can be one of prosperity.
sentences.zh: 人工智能的时代可能是一个繁荣的时代。

sentences.en: With the right choices, open weight AI can expand opportunity, strengthen competition, extend American technological leadership, mitigate risk, and ensure that the benefits of this extraordinary technology are shared broadly across our economy.
sentences.zh: 通过正确的选择，开放式人工智能可以扩大机会，加强竞争，扩大美国的技术领先地位，降低风险，并确保我们的经济广泛分享这项非凡技术的好处。

sentences.en: That future is worth building, and the United States should lead in building it.
sentences.zh: 这个未来值得建设，美国应该带头建设它。

content_html_zh:
July 24, 2026

在 20 世纪 80 年代，早期的开源软件先驱对人们普遍认为只有公司严格控制其代码软件才能进步的观念提出了挑战。 这一运动推动了一个透明的生态系统，世界各地的开发人员可以在其中研究、修改和改进软件。 开源社区开发的软件现在支持大部分互联网，并成为世界上最大的科技公司以及进行科学研究、网络安全和其他关键任务的美国军方和联邦机构使用的系统的基础。 开源不仅仅降低了软件成本；它创造了一个共享的知识基础，几代美国工程师和企业家在此基础上建立了他们的制度主权。

美国现在在人工智能方面面临着类似的选择。 我们的人工智能领导力将不是根据一种前沿人工智能模型来判断，而是根据美国是否建立了一个强大、开放的生态系统并扩散到各个领域。 这对于在全国范围内创造创新和繁荣的机会至关重要。 它需要扩大人工智能的使用范围，鼓励竞争，强大的应用层，并让美国人更好地控制他们所依赖的技术。 开放权重模型——任何人都可以在自己的基础设施上下载、检查、修改和运行的人工智能模型，是该基础的重要组成部分，因为它们使高级人工智能更易于访问、适应性更强且更广泛可用。

开放权重扩大了进入人工智能经济的机会。 初创企业、老牌企业、大学和公共机构可以建立先进的模型，而无需从头开始培训或为每项任务支付前沿模型的价格。 开放权重让每个组织能够以正确的成本将正确的模型与正确的工作相匹配，为真正的前沿问题保留前沿规模的能力，并在其他地方运行高效、专业的模型。 随着人工智能的使用扩展到数十亿日常任务中，这一规则将使人工智能在经济上可持续。 美国通过将人工智能扩散到工厂、医院、农场、教室和主要街道企业的工作流程中，赢得了人工智能时代的胜利。

开放权重扩大了进入人工智能经济的机会。 初创企业、老牌企业、大学和公共机构可以建立先进的模型，而无需从头开始培训或为每项任务支付前沿模型的价格。 开放权重让每个组织能够以正确的成本将正确的模型与正确的工作相匹配，为真正的前沿问题保留前沿规模的能力，并在其他地方运行高效、专业的模型。 随着人工智能的使用扩展到数十亿日常任务中，这一规则将使人工智能在经济上可持续。 美国通过将人工智能扩散到工厂、医院、农场、教室和主要街道企业的工作流程中，赢得了人工智能时代的胜利。

开放权重也加强了竞争，而竞争正是让人工智能的收益得以广泛分享而不是集中在少数人手中的原因。 通过允许许多组织构建、调整和部署高级模型，开放权重不仅在模型开发人员之间，而且在云芯片、应用程序和服务之间造成竞争。 这种竞争刺激了创新，降低了成本，并将人工智能的好处广泛分配到我们的经济中。

开放式重量还为客户提供了更大的控制权。 当组织投资人工智能时，他们希望知道自己不会被单一提供商所束缚，也不会失去随着时间的推移而建立的知识和能力。 开放权重模型允许组织控制自己的数据、评估模型并根据自己的需求调整模型，并将其部署到任何业务需求需要的地方，从而帮助提供这种保证。 随着组织利用人工智能创造价值，开放权重使他们能够通过自我改进的模型、专业能力和积累的知识来拥有这种价值，从而推动美国的主权和繁荣。

可以肯定的是，开放权重具有真实且明显的风险。 一旦发布，权重就超出了原始开发者的控制范围，修改后的版本也很难追踪或逆转。 但应对这种风险的正确反应不是禁止开放式举重。 在网络安全攻击者使用先进人工智能的世界中，防御者需要访问具有类似功能的模型，以便他们能够检测、模拟和响应新出现的威胁。 开放模型扩大了防御能力，提高了透明度，并允许在多个团队中发现和修复漏洞。

事实上，开放可能是人工智能安全保障的最重要途径之一。 仅仅依赖封闭模型本质上并不安全：它们可能会被破坏、滥用或以外界无法察觉的方式失败。 将先进的人工智能功能集中在少数封闭模型背后会加剧这种风险。 它会导致少量的单点故障，削弱竞争，并将关键技术留在少数提供商手中。 另一方面，开放权重模型允许广泛的研究人员和开发人员社区检查他们的行为，识别漏洞，制定保护措施，并随着时间的推移进行改进。 正如开源软件证明透明比默默无闻更安全一样，人工智能的安全可能取决于让更多人有能力测试和强化社会所依赖的模型。 它允许进行严格的基准测试和评估、红队以及与真实和已证明的危害相关的保护，而不是假设默认情况下封闭的系统更安全。

强大的人工智能生态系统并非定局。 政策制定者有一个采取行动的重要机会。 这包括扩大初创公司和研究人员的计算能力，投资共享培训资产（数据集、工具、评估框架），并通过避免过早限制开放模型来抑制竞争或推动海外创新，从而保持前沿多元化。 这些措施还必须考虑强大的应用层如何扩大人工智能在整个经济领域的主权使用。

在塑造这个生态系统时，政策制定者应小心，不要将合法的模型开发技术与盗用混为一谈。 蒸馏，即使用一个模型的输出来帮助训练或改进另一个模型的做法，是一种广泛使用的模型改进、评估和验证技术。 它反映了学习、构建和改进现有技术的悠久传统，这一传统自开源软件运动兴起以来一直帮助推动创新。 相比之下，从封闭模型中获取价值的非法行为引起了合理的担忧。 这些担忧应该通过有针对性的法律和商业框架来解决，而不是对在人工智能创新中发挥重要作用的技术进行全面限制。

人工智能的时代可能是一个繁荣的时代。 通过正确的选择，开放式人工智能可以扩大机会，加强竞争，扩大美国的技术领先地位，降低风险，并确保我们的经济广泛分享这项非凡技术的好处。 这个未来值得建设，美国应该带头建设它。
